## Description

Brief description of what this PR does.

## Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 📝 Data contribution (new inscriptions, corrections)
- [ ] 🔤 Mapping fix (transliteration correction in YAML adapter)
- [ ] 🌍 New language adapter
- [ ] 📖 Documentation update
- [ ] 🔧 Infrastructure / CI change

## Checklist

- [ ] I have run `pytest` and all tests pass
- [ ] I have run `ruff check src/ tests/` with zero errors
- [ ] I have added tests for new functionality (if applicable)
- [ ] I have updated documentation (if applicable)
- [ ] My data contributions are CC0 (public domain)
